svg.title: Household Assistant budget management view inventory
svg.desc: A complete mobile-first storyboard for managing budget lines: overview, create, review, edit, save confirmation, deactivate confirmation, unsaved changes, saved feedback, system states, and desktop adaptations.
svg.text: Current slice: active budget lines, create, edit, Slack logging, and deactivate. Mobile first; mutation flows use the shared bottom drawer.

g.text: What belongs in this budget line?
Include this line in expense categorization
Confirm these details before creating it.
Vet visits, pet food, medicine, and supplies
Include this line in expense categorization

text.tspan: Past expenses stay intact. This line will stop
appearing in budgets and Slack categorization.

g.text: Deactivation can be reversed through admin tooling

text.tspan: Your edits to Monthly Groceries have not

g.text: Shown for close, backdrop, Back, or navigation
Check the connection and try again.

svg.text: Interaction contract: phone dialogs are bottom drawers with a visible top reveal; medium and larger screens use a centered dialog. All writes pass through review.
